items.title: Nvidia Commits $40 Billion to Equity AI Deals This Year
items.summary: Nvidia has already invested a staggering $40 billion in equity AI deals in 2026, signaling its aggressive strategy to dominate the artificial intelligence landscape.

items.title: Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT for Enhanced User Safety
items.summary: OpenAI has launched a 'Trusted Contact' feature in ChatGPT, allowing users to designate a contact for account recovery and safety measures.

items.title: Nonsense Helps: Prompt Space Perturbation Broadens Reasoning Exploration in LLMs
items.summary: New research suggests that introducing 'nonsense' or perturbations into prompt space can significantly enhance the reasoning capabilities and exploration breadth of large language models.

items.title: Audio-Visual Intelligence in Large Foundation Models Explores Multimodal Capabilities
items.summary: A new paper investigates the integration of audio and visual intelligence within large foundation models, pushing the boundaries of multimodal AI understanding.

items.title: Running Codex Safely at OpenAI: A Deep Dive into Responsible AI Deployment
items.summary: OpenAI shares insights into the rigorous safety protocols and measures implemented for the secure and responsible deployment of its advanced AI model, Codex.

items.title: Continuous-Time Distribution Matching for Few-Step Diffusion Distillation Achieves Efficiency Gains
items.summary: Researchers propose a novel method for diffusion distillation that enables efficient generation with fewer steps by matching distributions in continuous time.

items.title: Open Weights Are Quietly Closing Up – And That's a Problem for AI Development
items.summary: An analysis highlights a concerning trend where 'open weight' AI models are becoming less truly open, potentially hindering collaborative research and innovation.

items.title: CreativityBench: A New Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Creative Reasoning via Tool Repurposing
items.summary: A new benchmark, CreativityBench, is introduced to assess the creative reasoning abilities of AI agents by evaluating their capacity for affordance-based tool repurposing.

items.title: Google's Prompt API: A Glimpse into Future AI Interaction Paradigms
items.summary: A discussion emerges around Google's new Prompt API, suggesting a shift towards more structured and programmatic interaction with large language models.

items.title: StraTA: Incentivizing Agentic Reinforcement Learning with Strategic Trajectory Abstraction
items.summary: New research introduces StraTA, a method that uses strategic trajectory abstraction to incentivize and improve agentic reinforcement learning.

items.title: AI Co-Mathematician: Accelerating Mathematicians with Agentic AI
items.summary: A new paper explores the concept of an 'AI Co-Mathematician,' demonstrating how agentic AI systems can significantly accelerate mathematical research and problem-solving.

items.title: Auto Research with Specialist Agents Develops Effective and Non-Trivial Training Recipes
items.summary: Research shows that autonomous specialist AI agents can discover effective and non-obvious training recipes for machine learning models, streamlining the research process.

items.title: Can RL Teach Long-Horizon Reasoning to LLMs? Expressiveness Is Key
items.summary: A study investigates whether reinforcement learning can effectively impart long-horizon reasoning capabilities to large language models, emphasizing the importance of expressiveness.

items.title: Parloa Builds Service Agents Customers Want to Talk To, Powered by OpenAI
items.summary: Parloa, an AI company, is leveraging OpenAI's technology to develop advanced service agents designed to enhance customer interaction and satisfaction.

items.title: Your AI Agent Already Emits OpenTelemetry: Why Aren't You Watching It?
items.summary: A developer advocates for monitoring AI agents using OpenTelemetry, highlighting the importance of observability for understanding and debugging agent behavior.
